creator: lars.stokholm@gmail.com
text:
I deinstalled tor-devel, removed /usr/local/etc/tor
(/usr/local/etc/rc.d/tor was removed automatically), reinstalled tor,
copied /usr/local/etc/tor/torrc.sample to /usr/local/etc/tor/torrc,
started tor and got this error. I tried again and I'm still getting
it.

There's no reference to "group" in either of the two files.

Cheers,
Lars
